MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar Aug-01-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Atty. KATIE SPIELMAN, Esq. of DL Law Group (tel: 415-678-5050) for Plaintiff Maggie S. (via Zoom videoconference).
Atty. JASON WU, Esq. of Foley & Lardner LLP (415-434-4484) for California Physicians' Service DBA Blue Shield of California.
Atty. JOHN DAVID COLLINS, Esq. of Maynard Nexsen P.C. (tel: 205-254-1104) for Defendant Human Affairs International of California (via Zoom videoconference).

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA PHYSICIANS' SERVICE DBA BLUE SHIELD OF CALIFORNIA's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication.

Counsel Katie Spielman requests a continuance to conduct additional discovery and depositions. The Court holds a discussion as to whether additional discovery would affect the ruling on the two motions for summary judgment. Upon conclusion of discussion, the Court grants leave to conduct further discovery. The Court states the discovery cut off is September 16, 2024. Parties are ordered to meet and confer and provide the court with a stipulation and proposed order regarding a briefing schedule and a new hearing date for both motions for summary judgment.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Court reporter: Carol Cox, CSR 5128 (tel: 714-336-1430 / carollynncox@aol.com). (302/RBU)
